title: Hearthtrail
description: Cozy, lag-free pack for quiet wanderers and campfire friends. Grab a map, breathe the biomes, come home when the stars feel right.
body:
**_🌲 Hearthtrail – wander, craft & conquer a world that feels alive! 🌲_**
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**_🔥 Teaser_**
- 🏕️ Campfire ambience, waving grass, dynamic storms & footstep sounds
- ⚔️ Fresh gear, new structures, exotic mobs + friends & foes to meet
- 🎨 Built-in shaders, connected textures, slick menus & 3D Skins
- ⚙️ Tuned performance: Sodium, Lithium, BadOptimisations = smooth 60 to 100+ fps
  
**_🔧 Tons of QoL_**
- right-click harvest, instant smelt, XP-clumps, smooth scroll, animated menus
- 🌿 Cozy tweaks: sit anywhere, campfire smoke, leafy particles, gentle skies, calm music triggers
- 🛠️ Tiny fixes: no chat reports, faster leaf decay, drip sounds, better biome blend – all comfort, no grind
- 🏡 Homey vibes: waystones for quick travels, cozy critters, cool rain, immersive storms – relax & explore

**_⚠️ Quick start_**
- 8 GB RAM minimum
- Fabric loader included – just hit Install & play

**_✨ Core vibes_**
**Immersive nature: particle rain, immersive storms, better animations
QoL deluxe: waystones, easy anvils, better bundles, tool-on-back
Visual candy: Iris shaders ready, continuity, visual workbench, cool rain
Exploration++: Structory ruins, voyager structures, dragon-kind evolutions**




**Grab your gear, trail the hearth – adventure sparks when you join! 🔥🗺️**
